title: Fast Food and Counter Workers
description: Perform duties such as taking orders and serving food and beverages. Serve customers at counter or from a steam table. May take payment. May prepare food and beverages.

tasks.text: Accept payment from customers, and make change as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve customers in eating places that specialize in fast service and inexpensive carry-out food.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Request and record customer orders, and compute bills, using cash registers, multi-counting machines, or pencil and paper.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Balance receipts and payments in cash registers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Communicate with customers regarding orders, comments, and complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve food, beverages, or desserts to customers in such settings as take-out counters of restaurants or lunchrooms, business or industrial establishments, hotel rooms, and cars.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor and order supplies or food items, and restock as necessary to maintain inventory.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform cleaning duties, such as sweeping, mopping, and washing dishes, to keep equipment and facilities sanitary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Brew coffee and tea, and fill containers with requested beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and organize eating, service, and kitchen areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare daily food items, and cook simple foods and beverages, such as sandwiches, salads, soups, pizza, or coffee, using proper safety precautions and sanitary measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and serve cold drinks, frozen milk drinks, or desserts, using drink-dispensing, milkshake, or frozen-custard machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap menu items such as sandwiches, hot entrees, and desserts for serving or for takeout.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up dining areas for meals, and clear them following meals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and return dirty dishes to the kitchen for washing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrub and polish counters, steam tables, and other equipment, and clean glasses, dishes, and fountain equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver orders to kitchens, and pick up and serve food when it is ready.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform personnel activities, such as supervising and training employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Add relishes and garnishes to food orders, according to instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute food to servers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select food items from serving or storage areas and place them in dishes, on serving trays, or in take-out bags.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify kitchen personnel of shortages or special orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take customers' orders and write ordered items on tickets, giving ticket stubs to customers when needed to identify filled orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, prepare, and deliver meals to individuals with special dietary needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Replenish foods at serving stations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash dishes, glassware, and silverware after meals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange tables and decorations according to instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
